name: facebook-profile-v1-matched
prompt: Design a premium Facebook profile image for Surnex that matches the attached cover style system. Use the first attached image only as the visual world/style anchor. Use the second attached image as the only valid Surnex logo mark reference. Create a square avatar-friendly brand image with one dominant focal mark. Dark near-black background, restrained lime glow, premium minimal composition, crisp edges, high contrast, unmistakably Surnex. Prefer a single centered logo-mark-led composition that reads clearly at small size. No fake text. No clutter. No extra symbols. Output image only.
